steps.title: Use the two-solution condition
steps.content: A quadratic has two distinct real solutions when the expression under the square root in the quadratic formula is positive. For $(n-26)x^2-16x+8=0$, that gives $$(-16)^2-4(n-26)(8)>0.$$ Simplify: $$256-32(n-26)>0$$ $$n\lt 34.$$

steps.title: Greatest integer n
steps.content: The greatest integer satisfying $n\lt 34$ is $n=33$. That matches choice 33 — 33 is correct.
